summary: ANDROID | Language is not translated to Spanish for welcome screen
scenario: Welcome screen shows Portuguese text instead of Spanish when app language is changed to Spanish in Device Settings
description_clean: When the app language is changed to Spanish in Device Settings, the welcome screen displays Portuguese text instead of Spanish.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or profile icon to access Account or Settings.
4. Go to Account → App Language (or Settings → Language).
5. Change the app language to Spanish (Español).
6. Close and reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the welcome screen that appears upon launch.
expected: The welcome screen should display text in Spanish (Español).
actual: The welcome screen displays text in Portuguese instead of Spanish.
